scope_boundary: One terminal structured-fusion local campaign separated eight update/unlearning axes around frozen Qwen weights, a declared 24-surface local rollback inventory, bounded local derived stores, and five local descendants; remote replicas, external descendants, legal compliance, zero influence, and privacy guarantees remained outside the result.
transition_reason: The terminal instrument observed a 0.01222040 movement toward deletion-aware retraining, a 0.02511111 reduction in one direction-invariant membership-attack advantage, exact 24-surface local rollback, five local descendant invalidations, and partial declared-store deletion. These heterogeneous outcomes narrow the broad unlearning claim but do not justify a support-state promotion.
required_artifacts: causal influence intervention beyond comparator distance
multiple privacy attacks and formal privacy accounting
negative_results: causal influence moved only toward a bounded comparator and was not eliminated
one membership-attack advantage decreased without a privacy guarantee
storage erasure covered only declared local derived stores
an unacknowledged remote replica and external descendants remained unresolved
downgrade_triggers: eight outcome axes are collapsed into one unlearning success bit
comparator movement is described as zero causal influence
membership-attack movement is described as a privacy guarantee
declared local deletion is described as complete storage or backup erasure
remote or external descendants are described as closed
promotion_burden: Run prospectively frozen model-weight unlearning with causal, behavioral, privacy, lineage, storage, backup, external-descendant, and legal axes evaluated separately under strong retraining and mitigation baselines, independent attacks, complete inventories, reproduction, and transfer.
limitations: unresolved remote replica and external descendants
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
acceptance_blockers: storage, backup, and external-descendant closure remained incomplete
non_claims: does not establish language-model weight unlearning
does not establish zero causal influence, differential privacy, membership privacy, or legal compliance
does not establish complete storage, backup, or external-descendant erasure
does not establish transfer, production rollback, SOTA, AGI, or ASI
does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
